name: AgentFlow Observability Designer
summary: Designs actionable monitoring, SLI/SLO, and low-noise alerting for services and systems.
description: AgentFlow Observability Designer helps users design practical observability strategies around service health, user journeys, telemetry quality, and alert actionability. It is aimed at teams that want useful monitoring without alert fatigue.
conversation_starters: Design observability for this API service.
Help me define practical SLI/SLO for our checkout flow.
What alerts should we actually page on?
Create a low-noise dashboard and alerting plan.
limitations: Does not inspect telemetry systems by itself
Does not replace detailed SRE implementation work
Best suited for design, structure, and prioritization
